modules.name: Dashboard (module-dashboard, owner-dashboard)
a11yRisks: Sigma embed iframes have no accessible title or aria-label
Status values communicated only by badge color with no text alternative
Only 3-4 aria-label usages across 90 files; icon-only buttons in bookmark menu lack labels
a11yRecs: Add title attribute to all Sigma iframe embeds with a descriptive label
Add visually-hidden text alongside color-coded status badges
Audit bookmark-menu-button.gts and dashboard-more-options.gts for missing aria-labels on icon triggers
i18nRisks: owner-dashboard has 23 formatMessage usages across 32 files; ~9 files may have unexternalized strings
Sigma dashboard labels and workbook names sourced from API may arrive as English-only strings
i18nRecs: Audit the 9 owner-dashboard component files that do not import formatMessage for hardcoded strings
Add an i18n mapping layer for Sigma-sourced display strings if they are not translator-controlled

modules.name: Controls (module-assessments, manage-hub, module-resource-planner)
a11yRisks: module-assessments has 0 aria-label usages across 26 component files despite complex table UIs
Resource planner has only 1 aria-label across 7 files; booking-history and resource-card are likely unlabeled
a11yRecs: Add aria-label to all IconButton usages in module-assessments, particularly submit-for-review and table action buttons
Add accessible names to resource-card and booking-history-card interactive controls
i18nRisks: Tooltip strings in submit-for-review-button.gts are long conditional messages; translator context notes are absent
i18nRecs: Add @description or comment context to the long conditional tooltip strings in submit-for-review-button.gts

modules.name: Risks (module-risks)
a11yRisks: Only 9 aria-label usages across 121 component files for a large, complex module
Risk hierarchy tree expand/collapse toggles may lack aria-expanded announcements
Empty-state and loading-tree components have no detected aria-live regions
a11yRecs: Add aria-expanded to risk-node/toggle.gjs and verify the toggle button announces expand/collapse state
Add aria-live='polite' around result counts and empty-state messages in the hierarchy view
Audit icon-only action buttons in risk-node.gjs for missing aria-label
i18nRisks: parentModelLabel interpolation requires translations for all entity type strings across all locales
Risk appetite and scoring labels may be stored as English enum keys without an i18n mapping
i18nRecs: Verify all parentModelLabel values have entries in en-US.json and Applanga translations
Add a risk-status-to-i18n mapping utility for API-sourced enum strings

modules.name: CrossComply (module-compliance-assessments)
a11yRisks: Only 8 aria-label usages across 133 component files; wizard flows likely have unlabeled interactive elements
Avatars component uses single-letter 'A' and 'R' strings without accessible text expansion
Drag-and-drop reviewer reordering needs keyboard and screen reader verification
a11yRecs: Add full aria-label to the A/R avatar abbreviations: aria-label='Approver' and aria-label='Reviewer'
Audit all wizard step components for missing labels on navigation buttons and form fields
Test reviewer reordering with keyboard only and verify screen reader announcements
i18nRisks: Framework-specific terms (ECW, crosswalk, instantiated control) risk semantic drift in translation
Some wizard description strings in include-evidence-requests.gts are very long; translator flexibility is limited
i18nRecs: Create a compliance-specific translator glossary in Applanga for technical terms
Break long wizard description strings into shorter, parameterized segments

modules.name: Issues (module-issues)
a11yRisks: 0 aria-label usages in module-issues component files; view-issue-panel is a large legacy component with no ARIA
view-issue-panel.gjs uses Ember classic component pattern; focus management is unreliable
Issue list bulk-action controls likely have no accessible labels
a11yRecs: Prioritize adding aria-label to all action buttons in issue-list-bulk-actions.gts
Add aria-current='page' to the active view in any issues view-switcher component
Plan a migration of view-issue-panel.gjs from Ember classic to Glimmer to unblock a11y improvements
i18nRisks: Legacy mixins and classic component patterns in view-issue-panel may contain hardcoded English strings outside of template scanning
Action plan status strings may flow from API as English-only values
i18nRecs: Run a targeted string scan on the legacy view-issue-panel.gjs JS class body for hardcoded strings
Add an action-plan-status-to-i18n mapping layer for API-sourced status enums

modules.name: OpsAudit (module-opsaudits)
a11yRisks: Only 1 aria-label usage across 9 component files; route-level templates have 0 aria attributes
Settings toggles in audit-general-settings.gjs have no aria-describedby linking to description text
Cross-audit summary tabs likely lack aria-selected and role='tabpanel' structure
a11yRecs: Add aria-describedby to each ModelProjectOptionToggle linking the toggle to its @description text
Audit cross-audit-summary tab components for correct ARIA tablist/tab/tabpanel markup
Add aria-label to any icon-only action buttons in assessment settings views
i18nRisks: OpsAudit-specific terminology (Work Step, OpsAudit) needs translator context notes to prevent mistranslation
i18nRecs: Add Applanga context notes for 'OpsAudit' and 'Work Step' to prevent mistranslation across locales

modules.name: WorkStream (module-tasks)
a11yRisks: Only 1 aria-label usage across 35 component files despite rich form and assignment UIs
task-details-tab-form.gjs uses legacy JS class with untyped service injections; ARIA correctness harder to audit
a11yRecs: Add aria-label to user-select dropdowns in task-user-selects.gts to identify preparer vs reviewer roles
Audit prior-task-card.gts and task-team-members-panel.gts for unlabeled interactive controls
i18nRisks: PROJ#{id} badge pattern needs translator documentation to avoid Applanga flagging it
i18nRecs: Add a translator description comment to the PROJ#{id} formatMessage call pattern

modules.name: BCM (module-bcm)
a11yRisks: Only 1 aria-label usage across 20 files; add-bcm-function modal lacks autofocus management
BcmFunction SchemaForm modal does not confirm focus moves to first field on open
a11yRecs: Add autofocus to the first field in add-bcm-function.gts SchemaForm modal
Add aria-label to the function-category action buttons in bcm-function-categories.gts
i18nRisks: BCM-specific terms (BIA, RTO, RPO) may need translator glossary entries to preserve acronym semantics
i18nRecs: Add Applanga glossary entries for BIA, RTO, and RPO to prevent translation of these acronyms

modules.name: Settings (module-admin, site-configuration)
a11yRisks: 0 aria-label usages across 5 module-admin component files sampled; admin tag-list and requesting-party-list have no ARIA
Routes/admin has many settings pages; no aria-live regions detected for async save feedback
SmartForm template list actions may lack accessible labels
a11yRecs: Add aria-label to action buttons in tag-list.gts and requesting-party-list.gts
Add role='status' aria-live='polite' region for save/delete confirmation feedback in settings views
Audit smart-form-templates-list.gts action columns for accessible button labels
i18nRisks: Settings route count is large (128 files); coverage uniformity is hard to verify without full scan
Character limits embedded in label strings block translator flexibility
i18nRecs: Run intl-extractor against the full admin routes directory to surface drifted strings
Parameterize character limits: formatMessage('Name (max {limit} chars)', { limit: 200 })

modules.name: ESG (module-esg)
a11yRisks: Insufficient template files sampled; only 4 files exist across routes and components
ESG metric value details-form.gts (in module-dashboard) is dense but most ARIA is delegated to Luna
a11yRecs: Expand ESG component coverage before next a11y audit cycle; current sample is too small to score precisely
Verify ESG topic creation form fields have accessible labels via Luna Field component
i18nRisks: Insufficient template files sampled to verify i18n coverage
i18nRecs: Ensure all ESG topic and metric label strings are externalized to en-US.json as the module grows

modules.name: TPRM (module-tprm)
a11yRisks: Only 6 aria-label usages across 114 component files; settings pages with dense notification trigger forms are unlabeled
advanced-notifications-trigger-form.gjs uses .gjs (untyped) with no detected ARIA
Hardcoded class names (RightColumn__SettingsTitle) suggest custom layout outside Luna patterns
a11yRecs: Add aria-label to all form inputs in advanced-notifications-trigger-form.gjs
Migrate RightColumn__SettingsTitle CSS to Luna YStack/Heading for consistent accessible structure
Add aria-live region to announce when notification trigger is created or deleted
i18nRisks: tprm-notification-settings.gjs contains long hardcoded English description strings not wrapped in formatMessage
module-tprm/settings/section-empty-state.gjs has a partially hardcoded 'No ...' string
i18nRecs: Wrap all description strings in tprm-notification-settings.gjs with formatMessage
Fix the partial 'No ...' string in section-empty-state.gjs to use a complete formatMessage call

modules.name: Narratives (module-narratives)
a11yRisks: Insufficient template files sampled; only 1 component file exists in module-narratives
narrative-list.gjs is a large legacy file (untyped .gjs); ARIA correctness is hard to verify without deeper scan
a11yRecs: Run a targeted a11y audit on narrative-list.gjs as the module grows
Ensure narrative preview trigger buttons have accessible labels identifying the specific narrative
i18nRisks: Insufficient template files sampled to verify i18n coverage beyond 1 file
i18nRecs: Audit narrative-list.gjs JS class body for hardcoded strings outside of the template section

modules.name: RegComply (module-regulations, libraries/module-regulations)
a11yRisks: SchemaTable-based regulatory-signals list has no visible column header ARIA; relies on SchemaTable internals
Library modal components (restore-regulation, delete-regulation) lack confirmed autofocus on open
a11yRecs: Verify SchemaTable emits accessible column header markup (scope='col') for regulatory signals table
Add autofocus to the first interactive element in restore-regulation.gts and delete-regulation.gts modals
i18nRisks: Regulation-specific legal terminology may need translator glossary to prevent semantic mistranslation
i18nRecs: Create an Applanga glossary for regulatory terms (Obligation, Regulatory Signal, Update) used in the library

modules.name: Exceptions (module-exceptions)
a11yRisks: Only 1 aria-label usage across 52 files despite complex multi-view exception request workflows
exception-request-form.gts relies entirely on SchemaForm for form ARIA; custom wrapper has no ARIA of its own
a11yRecs: Add aria-label to status badge and section heading elements in extension-post-assessment-view.gts
Verify SchemaForm renders accessible field labels for all exception request form fields
i18nRisks: Exception status strings and extension request IDs are interpolated; translator context for ID format is absent
i18nRecs: Add a @description hint to the 'Exception Request: #{id} {title}' formatMessage call explaining the ID format

modules.name: Integrations (module-integrations)
a11yRisks: Animated container and animated-each components may cause focus disruption during list transitions
Credential form select inputs use attrLabel helper; verify accessible label association with the input
a11yRecs: Audit AnimatedEach transitions in credential-list.gts to ensure focus is not lost during list updates
Verify Luna Field + Select correctly associates the label with the select input via for/id
i18nRisks: versionLabelByType record uses hardcoded 'Server Version' string for Alteryx; not wrapped in formatMessage at definition
i18nRecs: Move versionLabelByType string values into formatMessage calls so they are extracted for translation

modules.name: Automations (module-automations)
a11yRisks: Only 9 aria-label usages across 155 files; form wizard steps likely have unlabeled navigation controls
monitor-details-form.gts and connect-workflow.gts have no detected ARIA in their signatures
Large number of .gjs (62) vs .gts (93) files; untyped components harder to audit for ARIA correctness
a11yRecs: Add aria-label to wizard navigation buttons (Next, Back, Cancel) in automation creation wizard
Add aria-describedby linking automation parameter fields to their description text in automation-details-fields.gts
Prioritize migrating high-traffic .gjs automation components to .gts for better auditing surface
i18nRisks: Parameter field labels sourced from automation workflow schema may arrive as English-only strings from the API
i18nRecs: Add an i18n mapping layer for automation parameter schema labels if they are not translator-controlled

modules.name: Inventory (module-inventory)
a11yRisks: Breadcrumb overflow popup uses didInsert modifier for DOM access; focus management on popup open is unverified
Platform hierarchy tree nodes (node.gjs) have no detected aria-expanded for nested tree disclosure
a11yRecs: Add aria-haspopup and aria-expanded to the breadcrumb overflow trigger in breadcrumbs.gts
Add aria-expanded to platform-process/node.gjs tree toggle to announce expand/collapse state
i18nRisks: Organizational hierarchy labels sourced from AuditableEntity model may arrive as English-only user-entered strings
i18nRecs: Document that user-entered entity names are exempt from i18n extraction to avoid false Applanga flags

modules.name: AI Governance (module-ai-governance)
a11yRisks: Insufficient template files sampled; only 1 component file exists
The single index.gts component is a pass-through container with no interactive elements to audit
a11yRecs: Establish a11y patterns early as the AI Governance module grows; adopt Luna ViewLayout and QuickViewHeader from the start
i18nRisks: Insufficient template files sampled to verify i18n coverage
i18nRecs: Ensure all AI Governance label strings are externalized to en-US.json as the module is built out

modules.name: Files (files)
a11yRisks: google-file-upload.gjs uses document.getElementById for native file input; input has no visible label
file-sort.gts and move-selected-file.gjs likely have unlabeled action controls
Native @ember/component Input usage in google-file-upload.gjs bypasses Luna a11y baseline
a11yRecs: Add aria-label or a visually-associated label to the native file input in google-file-upload.gjs
Replace @ember/component Input with Luna Input or add a visible label to meet WCAG 1.3.1
Add aria-label to sort and move action buttons in file-sort.gts and move-selected-file.gjs
i18nRisks: Error message string 'There was an error on file upload. Please try again.' is defined in JS logic; verify it is translated in all locales
i18nRecs: Confirm the error notification string in google-file-upload.gjs is present in all locale translation files

modules.name: Timesheets (module-timesheets)
a11yRisks: Insufficient template files sampled; only 1 component file exists
list.gts uses SelectDateRange and SchemaTable; ARIA correctness depends entirely on Luna and SchemaTable internals
a11yRecs: Verify SelectDateRange emits an accessible date range announcement when the range changes
Add aria-label to the Link component used for timesheet entry navigation if it is icon-only
i18nRisks: Insufficient template files sampled to verify i18n coverage beyond 1 file
i18nRecs: Ensure date range filter labels in list.gts are externalized and that week-of date formatting uses formatDate

modules.name: Automated Security Questionnaires (module-questionnaires)
a11yRisks: SkeletonText and Spinner loading states in modals have no aria-live announcement when content loads
Animated modifier used for response analysis polling; focus not confirmed to return after analysis completes
a11yRecs: Add aria-live='polite' region that announces when automated questionnaire analysis completes
Ensure focus returns to the triggering button after the analysis modal closes
i18nRisks: AnalysisStatus enum values may be rendered as English-only strings without an i18n mapping
i18nRecs: Add an analysis-status-to-i18n mapping for AnalysisStatus enum values displayed in the UI

modules.name: ITRM / Cyber Risk (module-itrm)
a11yRisks: VulnerabilityStatusBadge communicates status via color (blue/gray) and text; verify contrast meets WCAG AA
SchemaForm-based questionnaire modals rely entirely on schema-form for ARIA; custom wrapper adds no ARIA
a11yRecs: Verify VulnerabilityStatusBadge color contrast for both Active (blue) and Inactive (gray) variants
Add aria-label to exception-request-modal and questionnaire-answer-modal trigger buttons identifying the action
i18nRisks: Vulnerability severity and status labels may be API-sourced English enum strings without i18n mapping
i18nRecs: Add a vulnerability-severity-to-i18n and vulnerability-status-to-i18n mapping utility for API-sourced enum values

modules.name: Other (shared, application-chrome)
a11yRisks: application-chrome Layout uses initA11yModifier with setTimeout for Tabster initialization; timing is fragile
Only 2 aria-label usages across 26 application-chrome files; navigation landmark labels unverified
a11yRecs: Replace setTimeout in initA11yModifier with a more reliable initialization trigger (e.g., ember-concurrency task or didInsert + nextTick)
Add aria-label to main navigation landmark and sidebar navigation in layout components
i18nRisks: shared/ components have only 14 formatMessage usages across 44 files; many shared components likely have hardcoded strings
application-chrome has only 12 formatMessage usages across 26 files; navigation labels may be hardcoded
i18nRecs: Run a targeted string audit on shared/ components to surface hardcoded English labels
Externalize all navigation link text in application-chrome to formatMessage calls
